case_title: PINTO STEPHAN P VS NIEGO REGINA

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINTO STEPHAN P IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NIEGO REGINA THE PLTF. HAS NOT YET PROVIDED THE DEFT WITH SPACE P-7 TO THE DEGREE THAT WOULD MAKE IT IRREVOCABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PINTO STEPHAN P AS TO DEFENDANT NIEGO REGINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
